title: VGetPixelToCamera Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VGetPixeToCamera (Calibration As String, X As Single, Y As Single, U As Single, ByRef X As Single, ByRef Y As Single, ByRef U As Single)
parameters:
Calibration	String expression containing the name of a vision calibration in the current project.

X	Real variable that will contain x coordinate in pixels.

Y	Real variable that will contain y coordinate in pixels.

U	Real variable that will contain the angle in degrees.

X	Real variable that will contain x coordinate in millimeters.

Y	Real variable that will contain y coordinate in millimeters.

U	Real variable that will contain angle in degrees.
description: Retrieves camera X, Y, and U physical coordinates for any object.
examples:
Dim xPix As Single, yPix As Single, uPix As Single
Dim xCam As Single, yCam As Single, uCam As Single
Dim cal As String, seq As String

cal = "testCal"
seq = "testSeq"
m_spel.VRun(seq)
m_spel.VGetPixelToCamera(cal, xPix, yPix, uPix, xCam, yCam, uCam)
